docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BPBH LMT AS TO DEFENDANT ARTHUR, JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ARTHUR, JAMES
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR FOR SMALL CLAIMS HEARING HEARING SET FOR DEC-12-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-27-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: BPAREDES. NOT REPORTED. (506)
